english_text: I became a doctor to save lives
I can't rest when patients need me
korean_text: 환자가 필요로 하면 쉴 수 없어요
romanization: hwanjaga piryoro hamyeon swil su eopseoyo

english_text: I'm sorry to tell you this

korean_text: 모든 환자가 우리에게 뭔가를 가르쳐 줘요
romanization: modeun hwanjaga uriege mwongareul gareuchyeo jwoyo

english_text: The hospital cafeteria food is okay
You look tired get some rest
Thank you for always being there
That's what being a doctor means
I'm proud to work with you all
Here's to another day of saving lives
We're not just colleagues we're family
Saving one life is saving the world
korean_text: 한 생명을 살리는 건 세상을 살리는 거야
romanization: han saengmyeongeul sallineun geon sesangeul sallineun geoya
